title: EGI Shared Database Schema — Minimal Fields v1
description: Canonical field set for any Ephemeral Generative Interface (EGI) record. Every conforming implementation MUST persist at least these fields. Ref: AEROSPACEMODEL-MCC-SPEC-010 §7

decay_policy.title: Decay Policy
decay_policy.description: Governs the dissolution behaviour of the Ephemeron after Bloom ends.

envelope_type.description: Shape of the Decay Envelope 𝒟(t).

half_life_ms.description: Time in milliseconds for intensity to halve. Applies when envelope_type is exponential.

terminal_vector.description: Required terminal emotive vector at t_dissolution. MUST be [0,0,0,0,0,0] per rule E-007.

crc_resolution.description: Curvature deviation quantisation steps per channel (default 5, per rule E-004).

provenance.title: EGI Record Provenance
provenance.description: Origin and audit trail for the EGI record.

created_by.description: Identifier of the system or agent that created this record.

source_spec.description: Reference to the governing specification (e.g. AEROSPACEMODEL-MCC-SPEC-010).

parent_record_id.description: If this record was derived from another, the parent record's interface_id.

interface_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this EGI record. Namespaced with the 'egi:' prefix.

condition.description: Human-readable or machine-evaluable condition that initiates Nucleation.

channel_onset_order.description: Ordered list of SENSORIUM channels activated during Nucleation.

trigger_patterns.description: One or more patterns whose satisfaction triggers Ephemeron nucleation.

seed_reference.description: Reference to the 256-bit seed σ that determines the generation function 𝒢. May be a literal hex string, a vault URI, or an external key reference.

complex_id.description: Identifier of the simplicial complex this Ephemeron belongs to.

simplex_dimension.description: Dimension of the simplex within the complex.

face_ids.description: Identifiers of the boundary faces in the simplicial complex.

hash.description: Integrity hash of the simplicial structure.

simplicial_signature.description: Topological signature anchoring this record in the MCC simplicial complex.

dominant_channel.description: Primary SENSORIUM channel(s) for the cover signal. Null for Full-Spectrum.

bloom_fraction_min.description: Minimum fraction of lifecycle that MUST be Bloom phase (rule E-003).

lifecycle_range_ms.description: Allowed [min, max] total lifecycle duration in milliseconds.

assembly_rules.description: Rules governing Ephemeron assembly: mode selection, phase constraints, and timing.

allowed.description: Whether this Ephemeron may be re-nucleated after dissolution.

max_reactivations.description: Maximum number of permitted reactivations. Null means unlimited (when allowed is true).

cooldown_ms.description: Minimum interval in milliseconds between dissolution and re-nucleation.

seed_rotation.description: Whether a fresh seed σ MUST be generated on each reactivation (recommended for replay resistance).

reactivation_conditions.description: Conditions under which a dissolved Ephemeron may be re-nucleated.

sensorium.description: Whether ε(t) at each instant is a valid SENSORIUM state (rule E-005).

traumacodedrama.description: Whether Bloom transitions comply with TRAUMACODEDRAMA rules (rule E-005).

supported_specs.description: List of sibling/parent specification IDs this record is compatible with.

cross_model_compatibility.description: Flags and references declaring compatibility with other MCC-stack specifications.
